schema.name: TrendMicroCASV2_CL
schema.description: Trend Micro Cloud App Security security events including security risks, virtual analyzer detections, ransomware threats, and DLP violations from various cloud services

columns.name: LogItemId
columns.description: Unique identifier for the log entry.

columns.name: Service
columns.description: Cloud service where the event occurred (exchange, sharepoint, onedrive, dropbox, box, googledrive, gmail, teams, exchangeserver, salesforce_sandbox, salesforce_production, teams_chat).

columns.name: Event
columns.description: Type of security event (securityrisk, virtualanalyzer, ransomware, dlp).

columns.name: ScanType
columns.description: The type of scan performed on the message or file.

columns.name: AffectedUser
columns.description: Email address or username of the affected user.

columns.name: Location
columns.description: File path or location where the threat was detected.

columns.name: DetectionTime
columns.description: Timestamp when the threat was detected.

columns.name: TriggeredPolicyName
columns.description: Name of the security policy that was triggered.

columns.name: TriggeredSecurityFilter
columns.description: Security filter that triggered the alert.

columns.name: Action
columns.description: Action taken by the security system.

columns.name: ActionResult
columns.description: Result of the action taken.

columns.name: MailMessageId
columns.description: Unique identifier for the email message.

columns.name: MailMessageSender
columns.description: Email address of the message sender.

columns.name: MailMessageRecipient
columns.description: Email addresses of message recipients.

columns.name: MailMessageSubmitTime
columns.description: Timestamp when the email message was submitted.

columns.name: MailMessageDeliveryTime
columns.description: Timestamp when the email message was delivered.

columns.name: MailMessageSubject
columns.description: Subject line of the email message.

columns.name: MailMessageFileName
columns.description: Name of the attachment file in the email.

columns.name: FileName
columns.description: Name of the file where the threat was detected.

columns.name: FileUploadTime
columns.description: Timestamp when the file was uploaded.

columns.name: SecurityRiskName
columns.description: Name of the identified security risk.

columns.name: DetectedBy
columns.description: Detection mechanism or engine that identified the threat.

columns.name: RiskLevel
columns.description: Risk level classification (e.g., High, Medium, Low).

columns.name: FileSHA1
columns.description: SHA-1 hash of the detected file.

columns.name: FileSHA256
columns.description: SHA-256 hash of the detected file.

columns.name: VirusName
columns.description: Name of the virus or malware detected.

columns.name: DetectionType
columns.description: Type of detection method used.

columns.name: RansomwareName
columns.description: Name of the ransomware variant detected.

columns.name: TriggeredDlpTemplate
columns.description: Data Loss Prevention template that was triggered.

columns.name: ConnectorName
columns.description: Connector Friendly Name assigned during connector setup
